understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all goal cells in each level by matching the goal's required shape, color, and rotation with the piece you control, then stepping onto the goal tile. Completing all goals advances to the next level; completing all levels wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player controls a piece with attributes: shape (0-5), color (orange, blue, green, red), and rotation (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°). Moving (North, South, East, West) costs 1 stamina; stamina reaching 0 loses a life and resets stamina to its maximum. Losing all lives ends the game. Tiles on the grid modify the piece: shape modifier cycles the shape, color modifier cycles the color in the order orange → blue → green → red → orange, and rotation modifier rotates 90° clockwise (wrapping from 270° back to 0°). Walls block movement; blocked directions are listed and must be avoided. A goal cell becomes activated when the carried piece's shape, color, and rotation all match its requirements; stepping onto an activated goal completes it.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all goal cells in each level by matching the goal's required shape, color, and rotation with the piece you control, then stepping onto the goal tile. Completing all goals advances to the next level; completing all levels wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player controls a piece with attributes: shape (0-5), color (orange, blue, green, red), and rotation (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°). Moving (North, South, East, West) costs 1 stamina; stamina reaching 0 loses a life and resets stamina to its maximum. Losing all lives ends the game. Tiles on the grid modify the piece: shape modifier cycles the shape, color modifier cycles the color in the order orange → blue → green → red → orange, and rotation modifier rotates 90° clockwise (wrapping from 270° back to 0°). Walls block movement; blocked directions are listed and must be avoided. A goal cell becomes activated when the carried piece's shape, color, and rotation all match its requirements; stepping onto an activated goal completes it.
